title: Client Maps
description:
Save map data locally, leave servers without losing map data.
Useful with Map In Slot, Minihud, Tweakeroo and other in inventory map display mods.
body:
Minecraft mod to cache server-side map data locally in `.minecraft/.client_maps/`.

### **Crucially, this mod does _NOT_ change map rendering, you will need another mod for that (see below)**

If you've ever had map data not load when in a chest, your local copy will sit as a placeholder until updated by the server.

Made to complement [Map in Slot](https://modrinth.com/mod/map-in-slot).

You can convert the raw map data to images [here](https://redstoned.dev/mods/clientmaps/converter).

Also works alongside [Map Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/map-tooltip), Minihud and other in inventory map display mods.

![shulker box demo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/K7BL4mb2/images/9f15001da59a99de18c4da9191ca10fe529a3f09.png)


If you have any questions please contact us on: [Discord](https://discord.gg/qM7mQtcJPW)
